newTests.name: Pins the sci_eval response contract — stdout capture + result pr-str. > :result carries the expression value as pr-str > integer result
Pins the sci_eval response contract — stdout capture + result pr-str. > println and return value coexist > println writes to :stdout AND return value lands in :result
Pins the sci_eval response contract — stdout capture + result pr-str. > println is captured to :stdout > multiple println calls concatenate in order
Pins the sci_eval response contract — stdout capture + result pr-str. > :result carries the expression value as pr-str > string result
Pins the sci_eval response contract — stdout capture + result pr-str. > page-accessing scripts (issue #106 reproduction path) > returning (.url page) gives the URL string, not an opaque fn
Pins the sci_eval response contract — stdout capture + result pr-str. > :result carries the expression value as pr-str > map result
Pins the sci_eval response contract — stdout capture + result pr-str. > println is captured to :stdout > single println call lands in :stdout
Pins the sci_eval response contract — stdout capture + result pr-str. > :result carries the expression value as pr-str > nil result
Pins the sci_eval response contract — stdout capture + result pr-str. > :result carries the expression value as pr-str > result is NEVER an opaque fn pr-str (issue #106 regression guard)
Pins the sci_eval response contract — stdout capture + result pr-str. > println is captured to :stdout > prn preserves Clojure reader syntax in :stdout
Pins the sci_eval response contract — stdout capture + result pr-str. > println and return value coexist > the pr-str of the last form is :result, not the println nil
Pins the sci_eval response contract — stdout capture + result pr-str. > page-accessing scripts (issue #106 reproduction path) > printing then returning the URL still shows both
